items.name_en: P【Genuine Leather Quality】🔥Exclusive Background👏Bea·Small New Shopping Bag/Hobo Bag
items.name_cn:
P【Genuine Leather Quality】🔥Exclusive Background👏Bea·Small New Shopping Bag/Hobo Bag
A soft style handbag with a CASSANDRE metal logo, elegant and chic. The leather texture is excellent from inside to out. The bag has two leather straps inside; when tied, it becomes a Hobo. The capacity is very sufficient!
With a soft body, the bag forms a natural indentation, giving a relaxed and free feeling, making the wearer look casual and effortless!
Model: 779029
Size: 28-47×23×13cm

items.name_en: P【Genuine Leather】👍(Exclusive real-life background)Bea New Shopping Bag/Hobo Bag
items.name_cn:
P【Genuine Leather】👍(Exclusive real-life background)Bea New Shopping Bag/Hobo Bag
Many girls want to buy a large bag when autumn and winter arrive, and this Bea model is perfect. The leather texture is excellent from inside to out. The bag has two leather straps inside; when tied, it becomes a Hobo. The capacity is very sufficient, a 13-inch MacBook fits in!
With a soft body, the bag forms a natural indentation, giving a relaxed and free feeling, making the wearer look casual and effortless!
Model: 763435
Size: 50×28×18cm

items.name_en: P❤️B's latest soft structured tote, crafted from grained calfskin. Made in an Italian workshop with suede lining. Features the brand's iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin panels with embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD). Includes a detachable shoulder strap for easy switching between tote and shoulder bag styles. Embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD) on the back. Dimensions 30 x 13 x 24cm.
